dialogue.speaker: Rogue Agent
dialogue.line: I need to know where the device is, now!
dialogue.visual_cue: Rogue Agent grabs Market Vendor's arm

dialogue.speaker: Market Vendor
dialogue.line: I don't know what you're talking about!
dialogue.visual_cue: Market Vendor tries to break free

dialogue.speaker: Rogue Agent
dialogue.line: Don't play dumb, I have reason to believe it's hidden somewhere in this market.
dialogue.visual_cue: Rogue Agent scans the surrounding area

dialogue.speaker: Rogue Agent
dialogue.line: You're the one who's been seen lurking around here, what do you know?
dialogue.visual_cue: Rogue Agent pins Suspicious Character against the wall

dialogue.speaker: Suspicious Character
dialogue.line: I don't know what you're talking about, let me go!
dialogue.visual_cue: Suspicious Character tries to struggle free

dialogue.speaker: Rogue Agent
dialogue.line: I don't have time for this, tell me where the device is or things will get ugly.
dialogue.visual_cue: Rogue Agent pulls out a gun

dialogue.speaker: Main Villain
dialogue.line: You're just in time to witness the detonation, Rogue Agent.
dialogue.visual_cue: Main Villain reveals the explosive device

dialogue.speaker: Rogue Agent
dialogue.line: You're not going to get away with this, I'll stop you before it's too late.
dialogue.visual_cue: Rogue Agent charges at Main Villain

dialogue.speaker: Main Villain
dialogue.line: We'll see about that, you're no match for me.
dialogue.visual_cue: Main Villain pulls out a gun and points it at Rogue Agent

dialogue.speaker: Rogue Agent
dialogue.line: I did it, I stopped the device from detonating.
dialogue.visual_cue: Rogue Agent breathes a sigh of relief

dialogue.speaker: Market Vendor
dialogue.line: Thank you, Rogue Agent, you saved countless lives today.
dialogue.visual_cue: Market Vendor shakes Rogue Agent's hand

dialogue.speaker: Rogue Agent
dialogue.line: It's all in a day's work, but I couldn't have done it without your help.
dialogue.visual_cue: Rogue Agent smiles and walks away
